title: Confidence Output
description: Rule-based confidence determination from the Confidence sub-agent. Implements R11 LowConfidenceGate's criteria table: every criterion gets a level + rationale; the aggregate is HIGH if all HIGH, MEDIUM if any MEDIUM and none LOW, LOW if any LOW.

definitions_retrieved.description: Per R9. HIGH if all chapters under analysis have Definitions retrieved or marked inline; MEDIUM if any inline-claim is suspect; LOW if any chapter's Definitions section is missing.

operative_provisions_retrieved.description: Per R3. HIGH if every assertion claim has ≥1 retrieval-backed cite; MEDIUM if ≥80% of claims backed; LOW if <80%.

cross_refs_resolved.description: Per R8. HIGH if all cross-refs resolved or explicitly skipped; MEDIUM if ≥1 unresolved; LOW if ≥3 unresolved.

delegations_resolved.description: Per R7. HIGH if no delegations or all resolved; MEDIUM if ≥1 with explicit reason; LOW if unresolved without reason.

currency_confirmed.description: Per R10. HIGH if all sources fresh; MEDIUM if some stale-annotated; LOW if stale_blocking and refresh failed.

verifier_passed.description: Per R5. HIGH if all anchors pass; MEDIUM if ≤1 minor mismatch resolved by revise; LOW if ≥2 unresolved mismatches.

drafter_revise_count.description: Internal quality signal. HIGH if 0-1; MEDIUM if 2; LOW if >2.

verify_flags_count.description: Per R13. HIGH if 0; MEDIUM if 1-2; LOW if ≥3 (R13 caps at 3; ≥3 is at-cap).

classification_overlay_complete.description: Per R12. HIGH/MEDIUM if all categories addressed; LOW if missing categories.

aggregate.description: HIGH if every criterion HIGH. MEDIUM if any MEDIUM and none LOW. LOW if any LOW. Drives the R11 gate: LOW blocks delivery.

incomplete_response_payload.description: When aggregate=LOW, the Confidence sub-agent populates this with the structured 'research incomplete' content (verbatim question, what was retrieved, failing criteria, next-step recommendation). The Renderer renders this in place of the normal deliverable.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation citing the specific signal (e.g., 'All 3 chapters have Definitions retrieved.', 'CA: complete; IL: 1 unresolved cross-ref to 820 ILCS 175 § 35; NJ: 0 retrievals.').

evidence.description: Optional list of doc_ids or audit-chain event ids that support the level. Used for after-the-fact auditing.
